title: albizia moniliforme
intro: Albizia moniliforme, also known as the flat catechu or flat catechu tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant's bark and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Albizia moniliforme include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Albizia moniliforme can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to create various remedies, such as tinctures and salves.
